cleanup_outcomes.keep_review: Hold candidate evidence in review when no stronger cleanup outcome applies.
cleanup_outcomes.quarantine_candidate: Candidate evidence has exclusion flags and must not contribute to confirmation until reviewed or replaced.
cleanup_outcomes.require_special_lane_policy: Candidate belongs to a special lane that needs lane-specific policy before confirmation.
cleanup_outcomes.require_high_value_review: Candidate group crosses high-value policy and requires stricter review.
cleanup_outcomes.require_matcher_reclassify: Candidate confidence is below direct-confirm threshold and needs deterministic reclassification or matcher improvement.
cleanup_outcomes.defer_until_more_evidence: Evidence volume or seller diversity is not enough for confirmation.

decision.reason: Candidate evidence cleanup requires a separate approved action model; this policy is plan-only.
